<?php /** * This file is part of the ramsey/uuid library * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @copyright Copyright (c) Ben Ramsey <ben@benramsey.com> * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT MIT */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Ramsey\Uuid\Builder; use Ramsey\Uuid\Rfc4122\UuidBuilder as Rfc4122UuidBuilder; /** * @deprecated Please transition to {@see Rfc4122UuidBuilder}. * * @immutable */ class DefaultUuidBuilder extends Rfc4122UuidBuilder { }
